steps.title: Connect the two claims
steps.content: The first sentence says Whitmore's pseudonym did more than conceal authorship. The second sentence explains exactly how: it was a rhetorical strategy aligning him with ancient republican ideals.

steps.title: Use confirmation
steps.content: The needed transition confirms and elaborates on the first sentence. B and D would signal contrast, and C would merely add a separate point rather than explain the claim already made. The answer is A.
